deadline_notes: Triennial (3-year) period. License renewal: June 30. Two period options: January 1–December 31 or July 1–June 30 (unique flexibility).
notes: Unique: CPAs can choose Jan-Dec or Jul-Jun period orientation. 8hr A&A for compilation CPAs only (not all attest). 24hr non-technical cap. 50% self-study cap (60hr max).
